---
title: "Node Overview"
---
<img src="images/main_logo.png" class="centered-image">
## GB7CAM AX.25 Node

### Radio Parameters

| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|------|
| Band | 2m |
| TX Frequency | 144.9500 MHz |
| RX Frequency | 144.9500 MHz |
| Mode | AX.25 Packet / LINBPQ |

---

## Location

- Locator: JO02AD  
- Near: Harston  
- Latitude: 52.14  
- Longitude: 0.08  
- Antenna height: 5 m AGL  
- ERP: 7 dBW  

---

## Administration

- ETCC Region: East Anglia (EA)  
- RSGB Region: 12  
- Keeper: G0LFT (Ian Henry)
